root_text.iti100:2.1: “Ahamasmi, bhikkhave, brāhmaṇo yācayogo sadā payatapāṇi antimadehadharo anuttaro bhisakko sallakatto.
root_text.iti100:2.2: Tassa me tumhe puttā orasā mukhato jātā dhammajā dhammanimmitā dhammadāyādā, no āmisadāyādā.
root_text.iti100:3.3: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ dānānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammadānaṁ.
root_text.iti100:4.3: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ saṁvibhāgānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammasaṁvibhāgo.
root_text.iti100:5.3: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ anuggahānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammānuggaho.
root_text.iti100:6.3: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ yāgānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammayāgo”ti.
root_text.iti100:8.1: Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.

translation_text.iti100:0.3: The Chapter on the Brahmin’s Offering of the Teaching
translation_text.iti100:0.4: The Brahmin’s Offering of the Teaching
translation_text.iti100:1.1: This was said by the Buddha, the Perfected One: that is what I heard.
translation_text.iti100:2.1: “I, mendicants, am a brahmin, committed to charity, always open-handed, bearing my final body, a healer, a surgeon.
translation_text.iti100:2.2: You are my true-born sons, born from my mouth, born of the teaching, created by the teaching, heirs in the teaching, not in things of the flesh.
translation_text.iti100:3.2: A gift of things of the flesh and a gift of the teaching.
translation_text.iti100:3.3: The better of these two gifts is the gift of the teaching.
translation_text.iti100:4.1: There are these two kinds of sharing.
translation_text.iti100:4.2: Sharing things of the flesh and sharing the teaching.
translation_text.iti100:4.3: The better of these two kinds of sharing is sharing the teaching.
translation_text.iti100:5.1: There are these two kinds of support.
translation_text.iti100:5.2: Support in things of the flesh and support in the teaching.
translation_text.iti100:5.3: The better of these two kinds of support is support in the teaching.
translation_text.iti100:6.2: An offering of things of the flesh and an offering of the teaching.
translation_text.iti100:6.3: The better of these two offerings is an offering of the teaching.”
translation_text.iti100:7.1: “The Realized One, <j>compassionate for all living creatures,
translation_text.iti100:7.3: Sentient beings revere him, <j>first among gods and humans,
translation_text.iti100:8.1: This too is a matter that was spoken by the Blessed One: that is what I heard.
